entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The agronomic crop being studied for vigor, grain size, and resistance traits

entities.name: EARLY VIGOR
entities.description: A plant growth trait characterized by canopy size and growth rate in early stages

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the sorghum grains, which affects nutrient profiles

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infestation by the parasitic plant Striga

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A phenotype where leaves remain green and functional for a longer period

entities.name: CANOPY SIZE
entities.description: A specific measure of plant vigor related to the spread of the foliage

entities.name: GROWTH RATE
entities.description: A specific measure of plant vigor related to the speed of development

entities.name: LEAF SIZE DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The variation in leaf sizes, linked to the stay-green mechanism

entities.name: GRAIN NUTRIENTS PROFILE
entities.description: The nutritional composition of the grain, partially regulated by grain size

entities.name: PCA
entities.description: Principal Component Analysis used to understand functional linkages between traits

entities.name: QTL CO-LOCALIZATION
entities.description: An approach used to identify overlapping quantitative trait loci for different traits

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of 181 progenies derived from a cross between senescent and stay-green lines

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map constructed using 271 molecular markers

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of identifying genomic regions associated with specific traits using tools like Cartographer 2.5

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A specific mapping function used within QTL analysis

entities.name: SBI04
entities.description: A genomic region containing QTLs for canopy size and Striga resistance

entities.name: SBI05
entities.description: A genomic region containing QTLs for canopy size, grain size, and stay-green

entities.name: STG-4
entities.description: A genetic region responsible for the stay-green phenotype and leaf size distribution

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that affects sorghum growth

entities.name: OPTIMAL FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental setting used for phenotyping grain size variability

entities.name: LEASYSCAN FACILITY
entities.description: A high-throughput phenotyping platform used for screening plant vigor

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic factors

relationships.description: is used to identify QTLs for
